Fear and Greed is at
17
(Extreme
Fear).
Bitcoin is at
$59K.
US spot Bitcoin ETF assets have fallen from $105.32 billion a
month ago to $81.83 billion as of today, marking significant
institutional capital outflow through the month. Today closes out
June, and BTC is on track for one of its weakest monthly
performances of the cycle.

The bigger story is what happened behind the scenes. Strategy
went an entire week without buying a single coin, choosing
instead to triple its cash reserve. Wall Street's biggest
custodians are quietly building stablecoin and DeFi
infrastructure regardless of where price lands.

Let's dive in.

Latest News
-----------

Sportsbooks and Crypto Exchanges Are Becoming the Same Business

Bernstein says the line separating sportsbooks, brokerages,
and crypto exchanges is disappearing, pointing to DraftKings
building its own exchange and Coinbase acquiring a clearing firm
to bring settlement in-house. Coinbase's move alone pushed it to
roughly $100 million in annualized prediction market revenue in
two months.

Kalshi and Polymarket are seen as likely acquisition targets.

Why does Bernstein say a Flutter-DraftKings merger remains
unlikely despite the trend?

Read More  
( https://link.coinmarketcap.com/f/a/pOfCDwEYrI_i_U3i0W5S_A~~/AAQRxRA~/_PUYrnY2dssgPZpxYx7zjooQudFmu_FXW3giuSMr2yih5LHPKhfVPw-gjG8nZsYHPTYePhyrgQoB6oaTLQ_RgZhMoxDR-uktLmza7AGxWtgAi5e5f3UDadsXQ

75248.subject: П÷▓╦ Claude is losing Amazon
75248.body:
----------
######                  [Collaborate with us](https://utm.genai.works/r/he2t9cz)


--------------------
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/8776fa6e-e2d0-4aec-9648-1bed6de3a659/GenAI_Daily_Banner.jpg?t=1778687445)
Caption: 


----------

----------
**Welcome back!** Amazon helped fund Anthropic, and now it's reportedly shopping for a cheaper model because Claude's bill is about to jump. California went the other way and put Claude in every state agency at half price. Cursor dropped an AI coding agent onto your iPhone, and a nine-person team made an animated feature for under $700,000.



**In today's Generative AI Newsletter:**

* **Amazon:** Why is Amazon looking for a way off Claude?

* **California:** Who put Claude in every state agency?

* **Cursor:** What can you now build from your phone?

* **Hollywood:** What just got 90% cheaper to make?


----------



----------
## [Amazon can't afford Claude anymore](https://www.neowin.net/news/amazon-may-use-openai-and-nova-models-after-anthropic-reportedly-raises-costs/)

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/68997962-0845-476e-b062-3e1f88c300b6/Beehiiv_01_-_Jun_30.png?t=1782813000)
Caption: 

Amazon helped fund Anthropic.б═

Now after they were one of the reasons Fable got banned, Amazon is reportedly searching for a way to cut what it pays for Claude.

The Information says Amazon is testing OpenAI's models and its own Nova models to cut costs before a renegotiated contract raises its bill next year.

Claude runs Amazon's shopping assistant, its Kiro coding tool and its Quick work assistant, so a higher rate hits a lot of products at once.

Amazon denies anything is getting pricier, calling it "incorrect that changes from our expanded collaboration will increase our costs."

The company that owns a slice of Anthropic, hosts its models and pays to use them is pricing the exit anyway. Anthropic's own backer is comparison shopping.


----------







----------
_Special highlight from our network_

## [This Tech Could Solve the 2X AI Data Center Demand](https://link.genai.works/SxSf)

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/7f194f0e-9a66-4f18-94f8-5fc6834883d6/BluSkyAI_Newsletter_GenAIWorks_DisplayAd__1_.png?t=1782812074)
Follow image link: (https://link.genai.works/SxSf)
Caption: 

According to Goldman Sachs, artificial intelligence will soon double the demand on Data Centers and require 175% of new energy consumption.б═

Where most of the tech world sees a problem, [BluSky AI](https://invest.bluskyaidatacenters.com/?utm_source=email&utm_medium=paid-partnership&utm_campaign=partnership345-835_06-30_40328294933) and their investors see an opportunity.

ItБ─≥s s

75246.subject: П²∙▐ Money just launched with 6% APY and a Visa Card. Stripe, Apple Pay, and your bank have a problem П÷≤ЁП÷▓Ё; SoFiБ─≥s QБ─і
75246.body:
View this post on the web at https://linas.substack.com/p/fintechpulse1095

Hey Everyone,
Good morning & happy Tuesday! Today, weБ─≥re diving into П²∙▐ Money, which just launched with 6% APY (what itБ─≥s all about, how it ties with П²∙▐ Super App play & why Stripe, Apple Pay, and your bank have a problem + bonus deep dive into SpaceX, which is an all ecompassing ElonБ─≥s ecosystem [ https://substack.com/redirect/b3bdca09-1318-49f3-a6b1-6bb1e44e4fc0?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] & The FounderБ─≥s Playbook for Winning in the AI Age [ https://substack.com/redirect/c52f6696-b594-47a8-960f-6b73347c1e44?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] inside), and SoFi, the Everything App thatБ─≥s finally becoming an everything earner (deep dive into SoFiБ─≥s Q1 2026, breaking the most importat financial facts & figures to see if itБ─≥s worth your time and money + bonus deep dives into Robinhood [ https://substack.com/redirect/50f6b9c8-4935-4436-9d54-6b58f10bd4ea?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] & Coinbase [ https://substack.com/redirect/be907aad-e9c3-4995-a451-130d4c578aab?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] inside). So letБ─≥s just jump straight into the good stuff П÷▄ІО╦▐
П²∙▐ Money just launched with 6% APY and a Visa Card. Stripe, Apple Pay, and your bank have a problem П÷≤ЁП÷▓Ё
The BIG News П÷■╔ Elon Musk just turned 600 million timelines into bank branches, and the economics make more sense than they look at first glance.
П²∙▐ Money went live late last week with a 6% APY on cash balances, a metal Visa debit card, instant peer-to-peer transfers, and FDIC insurance up to $10 million.
The yield alone beats every high-yield savings account in the U.S. But the yield is the distraction, not the strategy.
What happens when a platform with 600 million users and near-zero customer acquisition costs decides it doesnБ─≥t need to profit from your deposits the way JPMorgan or Goldman does?
Stripe canБ─≥t match those economics. Neither can any neobank on the market.
LetБ─≥s take a closer look at this, break down the economics behind the 6%, and what П²∙▐ MoneyБ─≥s launch means for Visa, Stripe, Apple Pay, and every bank in America...

Unsubscribe https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9saW5hcy5zdWJzdGFjay5jb20vYWN0aW9uL2Rpc2FibGVfZW1haWw_.icILeQia8-bZA4asuaTvvmzHDcDorQB7muOgb0D4OjM?
